pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh shell variable definition
Consistent across task.json and export_result.sh shell variable definition
Task.json description and export_result.sh line 188 verification logic
Export_result.sh line 104: 'if age < 30: reason.append("age_under_30")' indicates minimum eligible age is 30
Export_result.sh line 105: 'if age > 75: reason.append("age_over_75")' indicates maximum eligible age is 75

privileged_info_summary: Clinical trial cohort extraction task for protocol DM2-ORAL-2024. Patient eligibility criteria: age 30-75 years inclusive, with recorded name and date of birth. Output CSV will contain 8 required columns (patient_guid, nom, prenom, date_naissance, age, sexe, eligibility, exclusion_reason) saved to /home/ga/Documents/cohort_dm2_oral_2024.csv. Summary report saved to /home/ga/Documents/cohort_summary_dm2_oral_2024.txt. Data is synthetic, sourced from MedinTux test database (DrTuxTest) containing official demo data plus inserted test patients.
